defs: An affected elegance or euphuism of style, for which the Spanish poet Gongora y Argote (1561-1627), among others of his time, was noted.
quotes: Gongorism, that curious disease of euphuism, that broke out simultaneously in Italy, England, and Spain.
The Renaissance riots itself away in Marinism, Gongorism, Euphuism, and the affectations of the Htel Rambouillet.
